## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager interview for Technical Managing Editor role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Role involves project management and technical oversight for 3-5 client accounts, working with content managers and AI platform](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Kalil has relevant experience in content creation, AI, and managing multiple projects/clients](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [GrowthX is rapidly growing, with challenges in standardizing processes across teams](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)
  - [Kalil is excited about the role and aligns well with the company's direction and needs](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)

## Topics

### Role Overview and Company Structure

  - [GrowthX delivery org structured in pods, with account strategists overseeing 2-3 pods](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
  - [Technical Managing Editor manages 3-5 accounts, working alongside content manager](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [Key responsibilities: project management, client updates, and technical oversight of AI platform](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Not directly involved in prompt engineering, but provides feedback to product team](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)

### Candidate Background and Experience

  - [Currently at Sanofi (pharmaceutical company) in digital function, focusing on content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [Led Responsible AI program launch, including training materials for 100k employees](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
  - [Previous experience at Zuva AI (legal tech) creating and editing technical content](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [Manages multiple small client contracts alongside main role](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)

### Candidate's Career Goals and Interests

  - [Seeking more scale and excitement in work](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)
  - [Attracted to GrowthX's focus on content and cutting-edge AI technology](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
  - [Excited about company's growth potential and leadership](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)

### Work Style and Project Management

  - [Prioritizes based on impact and urgency](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Typically focuses on top 3 big tasks per day, with 2 additional smaller tasks](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [Uses tools like JIRA for project management](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
  - [Comfortable managing multiple clients with different communication styles](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)

### GrowthX Work Environment and Tools

  - [Communication via Slack (including Geekbot) and open coordination](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=1383.0)
  - [Airtable for client-facing project management](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [Weekly client meetings](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
  - [Flexible pod communication structures (e.g., daily/weekly standups)](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)

### GrowthX AI Platform

  - [Customizable LLM selection for different tasks](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
  - [Incorporates image generation workflows](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
  - [Utilizes various tools like Flexity for research and Claude for projects](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)

### Onboarding Process

  - [Week 1-2: Company-wide onboarding, document review, workshops](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
  - [Week 2-3: Introduction to pod and client management, shadowing](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)
  - [Week 4: Expected to manage a pod independently](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=1708.0)

### Current Challenges at GrowthX

  - [Rapid client growth led to quick onboarding and non-standardized processes](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)
  - [Disjointed delivery across pods due to individual adaptations](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=1825.0)
  - [Effort to create unified processes while respecting existing workflows](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=1836.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Connect on LinkedIn](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Consider Kalil's experience with standardizing processes in fast-growing environments](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=1843.0)
  - [Evaluate Kalil's fit for the role based on his content creation and project management experience](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)
  - [Assess Kalil's ability to adapt to GrowthX's fast-paced onboarding and client management expectations](https://fathom.video/share/fE1yisEsfFwYmDUh7i6ZSqdcoTBDx36y?tab=summary&timestamp=1708.0)
